subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! The Friend hath returned, and He Who conversed with God doth witness and behold, and Sinai is perfumed with the breezes of Revelation once again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم قد رجع الخلیل و الکلیم یشهد و یری و الطور تعطر من نفحات الوحی مره
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @return of the Manifestations of God
